narrative:
Wood County has 87,493 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.0%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.1% of registrants.
